channel.title: Education on Tabassum Aktar
channel.description: Recent content in Education on Tabassum Aktar

item.title: B.Sc. in Computer Science & Engineering
item.description:
Institution: International University of Business Agriculture and Technology (IUBAT), Dhaka
Status: Present (4th Semester)
CGPA: 3.86

item.title: B.Sc. in Computer Science & Engineering
item.description: Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Engineering at IUBAT, Dhaka. Maintaining a strong CGPA of 3.86 through the 4th semester while actively engaging in academics, teamwork, and skill-building opportunities on campus.

item.title: Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC)
item.description: Completed Higher Secondary Certificate from Adamjee Cantonment College, Dhaka, achieving an outstanding GPA of 4.92. This rigorous academic environment strengthened analytical thinking and laid a solid foundation for higher studies in engineering.

item.title: Secondary School Certificate (SSC)
item.description:
Institution: Sonatola Pilot Girls High School, Bogura
GPA: 5.00

item.title: Secondary School Certificate (SSC)
item.description: Earned a perfect GPA of 5.00 in the Secondary School Certificate examination from Sonatola Pilot Girls High School, Bogura. This achievement reflects a disciplined work ethic and a commitment to academic excellence from an early stage.
